name: Abyss Playhouse - Fantastic Theater
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>魔</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ま</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>界</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>劇</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>げき</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>場</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>「ファンタスティックシアター」
desc: You can reveal 1 "Abyss Actor" Pendulum Monster and 1 "Abyss Script" Spell in your hand; add 1 "Abyss Script" Spell from your Deck to your hand, with a different name than that revealed Spell. While you control a Pendulum Summoned "Abyss Actor" Pendulum Monster, any monster effect activated by your opponent becomes "Destroy 1 Set Spell/Trap your opponent controls". You can only use each effect of "Abyss Playhouse - Fantastic Theater" once per turn.
